title: chrysocoma praeacoa
intro: Chrysocoma praeacoa, also known as African bush tea or wild chamomile, is a flowering plant native to the Western Cape Province of South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chrysocoma praeacoa include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and aiding in digestion. Chrysocoma praeacoa can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, which can be enjoyed hot or cold, or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent like ethanol.
